answers.prompt_question: Tell me about where you grew up — the town, the neighborhood, the place it was.
answers.text: I grew up in Zachary, Louisiana since I was 5 years old. I was born when we lived at 421 Day Dr in Baker, LA. In Zachary, we lived on 26 acres on Rollins Rd. We moved there in 1969.

answers.prompt_question: Tell me about your brothers and sisters, if you had any growing up.
answers.text: I have 3 sisters, Michelle, nicknamed Pookie, Stephanie, nicknamed Beetle, and Robyn. I have one brother, Brent. I am in youngest. Everyone calls me Boosey because I am the caboose of the family.

answers.prompt_question: Where has life taken you since — where do you call home these days?
answers.text: After graduating college in 1987 in Computer Science, I moved to Raleigh, NC working for IBM. After 4 years and a marriage, we moved to Mandeville, LA where we raised our family. In 2017, we moved to downtown New Orleans in a condo in the CBD. In 2022, we moved to the Irish Channel at 3137 St Thomas St in New Orleans.

answers.prompt_question: Tell me about the work you've done over the years.
answers.text: I have worked for IBM or within the IBM ecosystem all my career. I retired in 2024.

answers.prompt_question: Tell me about your children, if you have any.
answers.text: We have 3 children Zach, born in 1994, Alex in 1997, and Emily in 1999. All graduated college and are a CRNA, AI Engineer, and Cardiac Cath Lab Nurse, respectively.

answers.prompt_question: And your grandchildren — tell me about them.
answers.text: We have 2 grandchildren, Billy, Zach and Emma's son who is 21 months and Belle, Alex and Catherine's daughter who is 11 months.
